reviews.title: Holiday for the 25th of Tet
reviews.text: The room does not belong to the Apec Madala hotel, but rather is rented out by an individual, so the service is extremely disappointing. Upon arrival, we had to wait 30 minutes for the room owner to show up for check-in and had to ask the hotel security to take us up. The mattress was itchy, and if we wanted to use the hotel amenities, we had to pay extra. The pool fee is 120,000 VND per child.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Room with Kitchenette and Balcony

reviews.title: Stay
reviews.text: The Statt are ùn Friendly it is hard to get help over charge on parking the room is small no hot water

reviews.title: Managed condo-not a hotel.
reviews.text:
This is a large condo style facility that uses multiple booking agencies. 

When we arrived late afternoon there was no-one at reception-just a security guard. Our check in was not smooth. The room for 2 people was small & had limited space. There’s a washing machine on the balcony & small fridge, kettle, hair dryer. 

Security safe had no batteries so didn’t work & the bathroom vanity doors were broken. Bed was ok. 

Location is a long walk to the beach & a taxi ride to the old town centre. Manager did sort things out for us and was friendly, but we would not stay here again.

reviews.title: Good value
reviews.text: We needed a room while bicycling through, and this place served tge purpise. We came off season,  so there wasn't a lot to do. Probably a lot better in-season.

reviews.title: APEC TUY HOÀ
reviews.text: Great place to stay, lovely and sincere staff. The dining services around Tuy Hoa are delicious, affordable, and the locals are hospitable. I will return to this place soon.
reviews.room_type: City View Room with 2 Queen Beds

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The room is spacious and new, but the bathroom has a smell. The furniture is somewhat cheap. It’s a double room but missing a drinking glass. I was a bit surprised that the price for booking here was low, but upon arrival, I found out it’s like Airbnb and there are extra charges for using amenities. Parking the motorcycle is inconvenient; each time you go in and out, it costs 5,000 VND, and if you stay overnight, it’s 30,000 VND. Overall, considering the price, the basic interface is surprisingly decent. I rented my room for 2 nights but did not receive a towel change or additional bottled water. When the representative talked to me, they said "yes," but when I returned to the room on the second night, everything was still the same—no new towels, no room cleaning. When I asked about it, they said I "didn't mention it earlier." Hmm, overall I didn’t feel very happy.

reviews.title: Cool hotel
reviews.text: Cool room, good location

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: It is closed to the beach. Room is moderned and full equipped.
reviews.room_type: City View Room with 2 Queen Beds

reviews.title: Excellent

Đèn ban công không bật được, đèn giường ngủ thì nối liền với máy giặt, và đèn hành lang thì có tận 2 công tắc???

Mọi thứ còn lại rất tốt

Over all Room is OK .
Service and room cleaning two days once not daily.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The power outage has a significant impact on my feelings. Everything was going quite well until there was a puddle of water in the room. It's a natural disaster, after all, this is a good option.

reviews.title: Fine
reviews.text: Location is good, easy to find, there aren’t any slippers, the pillows and the blankets have some dust. Balcony is not clean enough, overall, aceptable but not enjoyable.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Everything was perfect! Only recommendation is that they should make it more clear that for the swimming pool you have to pay extra, cause when you look at the photos you assume it is included.

reviews.title: Ten points don't exist, but 🥰
reviews.text: The room is very beautiful, fully equipped, with a super chill view of the city, and clean. If I have the chance to come to Phu Yen again, I will book it again 🥰 everyone in the group loved it 🥳
reviews.room_type: City View Room with 2 Queen Beds

reviews.title: Very good.
reviews.text:
Room: clean, fully equipped. However, the balcony view is not like the picture, a bit disappointing. 
The manager is very enthusiastic and cheerful. 
Motorbikes are available for rent, they are quite new, regularly maintained and reasonably priced.

reviews.title: Queen 2 beds
reviews.text: The room is spacious, airy, and clean. It can comfortably accommodate 4 people, has a refrigerator, and an induction stove (I am not sure if it can be used as I do not have the need to use it).

reviews.title: Clean and convenient
reviews.text: The room is clean, comfortable; the view is excellent with nothing to complain about. There is a beautiful beach view pool, close to the shopping center and the beach. Overall, I really like this place, looking forward to seeing it again <3

reviews.title: In the morning, looking at the sea, I really like it.
reviews.text: Waking up in the morning and looking at the blue sea brings a truly relaxed spirit.

reviews.title: Phòng rộng, gió biển mát rượi!
reviews.text: Phòng rộng rãi, thoáng mát, buổi tối mở ban công ngắm biển và gió thổi vào rất dễ chịu.

reviews.title: Good experience
reviews.text: Clean check-in. Staff guides a quick check-in, central location with a parking fee of 35,000 per day for cars.

reviews.title: Wonderful
reviews.text: I received apartment 2120, which is clean, and the staff are enthusiastic. The building is central. The parking fee is 35,000 VND per day in front of the lobby, which has been noted.

reviews.title: Great place at affordable price
reviews.text: Strongly recommend this place. It’s an apartment hosted by its owner, not owned by the hotel. Check in is smooth and the room is convenient!

reviews.title: Beautiful room, clean, good location!
reviews.text: In Tuỳ Hoà, I often stay at Apec, with a spacious and comfortable room featuring two 1.6m beds, at a reasonable price. Full amenities and modern quality equipment. There is a convenient parking area right in front of the lobby, with a reasonable price of only 35,000 VND per day and night.
reviews.room_type: City View Room with 2 Queen Beds

reviews.title: Modern, well-equipped apartment with a stunning sea view. Excellent service.
reviews.text: Staying here was a dream. The view was stunning, and the apartment was modern and fully equipped. The host provided excellent service. Will definitely return!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: In the morning, parking is free and convenient. However, the prices in the basement are quite high. Everyone can park outside. The apartment is decent, and the hotel security staff is nice.

reviews.title: Super clean and spacious with an unforgettable sunrise view from the balcony.
reviews.text: Highly impressed with this beachfront apartment! Clean, spacious, and had everything we needed. Watching the sunrise from the balcony was unforgettable.

reviews.title: 舒适且设备齐全
reviews.text: 房间宽敞，家具舒适，空调制冷效果很好，夏天住起来很凉爽。

reviews.title: Nice room
reviews.text: Nice decoration, near the city center, good service.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The design room is simple but fully functional. Clean, tidy, and close to the amenities around the center. The staff is friendly and always provides good support to customers. I am satisfied.

reviews.title: Clean, good price
reviews.text: New, clean, modern and eye-catching design, clean and fragrant bed linens. If I go to Phu Yen, I will choose to stay here.

reviews.title: I booked 2 rooms and stayed over the weekend.
reviews.text: I had a good and very comfortable experience. The car was parked right in front and there were no extra costs. It's very convenient to go to the beach and Nghinh Phong square.
reviews.room_type: City View Room with 2 Queen Beds

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room in the center is very suitable for getting around. There are pharmacies, Vincom, convenience stores, and cafes nearby, making it very convenient for family travel. The room has two beds, fully equipped and clean. The city view overlooking the beautiful square.
reviews.room_type: City View Room with 2 Queen Beds

reviews.title: It is worth what we pay and spend.
reviews.text: I stayed in 1812 and found the apartment to have a beautiful view, close to the beach, with eager and dedicated staff, and near stores and local attractions.

reviews.title: It is really worth experiencing.
reviews.text: I read the comments and saw that some were not sure if it was true or not, but my experience was worth it. I stayed in 1505B and found the apartment beautiful, with a very good view, close to the sea, and an enthusiastic and dedicated staff.

reviews.title: Definitely will come back.
reviews.text: I really like this room, it's beautiful and has quite elegant decor. The view is very nice, perfect for enjoying the scenery in a chill way. The staff don't talk much but they are attentive in their service.

reviews.title: Worth trying
reviews.text: The new room is incredibly clean and beautiful, with a mesmerizing street view. The best part is the staff, who are extremely attentive and accommodating.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is spacious with a great view. The staff may seem cold but they are very kind and dedicated. The building has a buffet area and a swimming pool, making it quite convenient.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Perfect and excellent

reviews.title: Một nơi để nghỉ tuyệt vời
reviews.text: Phòng rộng sạch sẽ, tiện nghi, thơm tho. Nhân viên nhiệt tình, vui vẻ. Địa điểm gần trung tâm, đi đâu cũng tiện. Nếu đi lại mình sẽ còn book ks này và rcm cho nhiều người nữa

reviews.title: Very satisfied with the service provided by the staff.
reviews.text: An apartment near the beach, with the most healing view I know. The room is softly decorated, elegant, and very clean. I will support it if I visit again.

reviews.title: Clean and worth the money.
reviews.text: My family is very satisfied, thank you to the staff who were very enthusiastic, the room is beautiful and very clean, and the view is also acceptable.

reviews.title: Very good.
reviews.text: The apartment is airy, clean, and fully equipped with necessary amenities. The view from this unit is beautiful, encompassing the entire city; at night, sitting on the balcony and snapping a few photos is very picturesque.

reviews.title: Clean and quality
reviews.text: Quality goes hand in hand with the price, very satisfied with this room booking. Looking forward to seeing you again soon. The view is amazing and the room is super clean and beautiful.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: An ideal resort! The apartment is clean, spacious, and has a beautiful sea view. The host is very friendly and thoughtful. I will come back again when I have the chance.

reviews.title: Beautiful room
reviews.text: Luxurious room, fully equipped. Friendly staff. The room has a beautiful sea view and good lighting.

reviews.title: Near the sea.
reviews.text: The apartment is close to the beach, with a beautiful view, perfect for taking stunning photos. The staff is very enthusiastic; I rented a car and got food recommendations from them, which was very convenient. I want to send my thanks to the team there!

reviews.title: Clean and comfortable.
reviews.text: The room is clean and comfortable. I booked a room with a sea view, overlooking the Nghinh Phong Tower, which is very beautiful. There are many tasty places to eat around the apartment. If you want to eat at local restaurants, just ask the staff, they are very reliable.

reviews.title: Luxury apartment
reviews.text: Beautiful apartment. I can't believe that the price is so reasonable while the furniture is of such quality, with a five-star sea view. The staff is also very helpful with many things. In general, I am satisfied.

reviews.title: Beautiful room, reasonable price.
reviews.text: The room is really cute, the decoration style is very chic and modern. It's very close to both the beach and the square from the apartment. The staff is enthusiastic; when I asked about local restaurants, they pointed out only good and affordable places. I will definitely come back if I have the chance.

reviews.title: 콘도텔
reviews.text: 온라인에서 정확한 위치가 검색 안됨. 청소상태가 불량함.

reviews.title: 괜찮아요
reviews.text:
위치도 괜찮고 다 좋은데  개미가 많고
침대가  돌침대 같아요
그래서 2일동안 다른숙소에서 쉬다  왔어요

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Khách sạn nhân viên không nhiệt tình, nói chuyện với khách cọc lóc, ngăn kéo còn rác của khách trước, cửa nhà tắm hư kéo không được, nhân viên không hướng dẫn rõ cho khách. Không muốn so sánh nhưng mandala phan thiết oki hơn rất nhìu nếu được cho nhận viên qua trải nghiệm dịch vụ cách hưởng dịch vụ thái độ dịch vụ như thế nào. Tuy đây là tuỳ căn hộ mình nhiều chủ sở hữu mình nghĩ mn nên cân nhắc trước khi thuê
reviews.response:
Dạ bên em xin lỗi rất nhiều ạ vì để mình đã có trải nghiệm không tốt bên em ạ
Vì bạn nhân viên mới nên vẫn chưa khéo léo việc giao tiếp khách hàng mong mình thông cảm bỏ qua bên em ạ 
Dạ vấn đề vệ sinh bên em đã chấn chỉnh lại các chị buồng phòng để có chất lượng tốt nhất ạ 
Bên em thành thật xin lỗi và cảm ơn góp ý mình ạ

reviews.title: Du lịch
reviews.text: Nói chung là không hài lòng mọi thứ
reviews.response:
Dạ bên em cảm ơn mình lựa chọn bên em lưu trú ạ 
Trong quá trình lưu trú em thấy mình không phản ánh cho bên em 
Nhưng sáng mình check out sớm nhân viên bên em hướng dẫn mình để thẻ trên phòng nhưng mình vẫn mang thẻ xuống để dưới sảnh và làm mất hết thẻ bên em và bên em liên hệ mình về phí thẻ thì mình không chấp nhận phụ thu phí mất thẻ mình hoàn toàn im lặng vấn đề làm mất thẻ chỉ vì bên em làm đúng trách nhiệm là thu phí mất thẻ và mình im lặng không trả khoản phí đó nên mình thấy " không hài lòng mọi thứ " bên em ????

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Phòng nhỏ, điều hòa cũ không đủ mát
reviews.response:
Dạ bên em xin cảm ơn mình lưu trú bên em 
Bên em rất xin lỗi vì để mình trải nghiệm không tốt dịch vụ bên em ạ
reviews.room_type: City View Room with 2 Queen Beds

Em cảm ơn vì mình đã ở và giúp bên em có kinh nghiệm để thu phí khi mất thẻ ạ

reviews.title: Tạm ổn
